race.comment: Tricky race. CHOCOLATE BOX (4) resumes off a short break and should have good residual fitness. She didn't manage a win in three runs last time in but has the peak figures to challenge, she should be charging at them late. STELLAR MOFEED (5) was well below her best last start, perhaps struggling to see out 1400m on that occasion. She was going well prior and can bounce back. MISS DECEIVER (9) won her maiden well at Kilmore last time and could measure up with further improvement. TILLYA TEPE (6) lines up for her fifth start and is fairly progressive, winning well here two back, good again to this level last time. She'll be hard to hold out from a wide gate.
